---
name: 💡 Feature or Data Format Request
about: Suggest new data formats, visualizations, or additional chemical metrics.
title: '[REQUEST]: '
labels: enhancement, discussion
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what you are trying to achieve (e.g., "I need the time-series data in JSON format instead of CSV to build a web visualizer").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of the data structure, formatting, or feature you want added to the repository.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any workarounds you are currently using to parse or analyze the current dataset.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, sample code, or mockups about the feature request here.
